mapper.select:
SELECT c.id as comic_id, c.title, c.cover_path as cover_url, COUNT(DISTINCT ch.id) as chapter_count, COUNT(m.id) as page_count, SUM(CASE WHEN m.media_type = 'IMAGE' AND m.hq_status = 'READY' THEN m.file_size ELSE 0 END) as hq_size, SUM(CASE WHEN m.media_type = 'IMAGE' AND m.lq_status = 'READY' THEN m.lq_size ELSE 0 END) as lq_size, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.hq_status) as hq_statuses, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.lq_status) as lq_statuses FROM comic c LEFT JOIN chapter ch ON ch.comic_id = c.id LEFT JOIN page m ON m.chapter_id = ch.id AND m.media_type = 'IMAGE' WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY c.id
ORDER BY hq_size ORDER BY lq_size ORDER BY c.title ORDER BY (hq_size + lq_size)
DESC ASC
LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM comic c LEFT JOIN chapter ch ON ch.comic_id = c.id LEFT JOIN page m ON m.chapter_id = ch.id AND m.media_type = 'IMAGE' WHERE c.deleted_at IS NULL
AND c.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')

SELECT ch.id as chapter_id, ch.chapter_no, ch.title, COUNT(m.id) as page_count, SUM(CASE WHEN m.media_type = 'IMAGE' AND m.hq_status = 'READY' THEN m.file_size ELSE 0 END) as hq_size, SUM(CASE WHEN m.media_type = 'IMAGE' AND m.lq_status = 'READY' THEN m.lq_size ELSE 0 END) as lq_size, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.hq_status) as hq_statuses, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT m.lq_status) as lq_statuses FROM chapter ch LEFT JOIN page m ON m.chapter_id = ch.id AND m.media_type = 'IMAGE' WHERE ch.comic_id = #{comicId} GROUP BY ch.id ORDER BY ch.sort_order
